guardrails: Do not merge PRs, push to main, deploy, apply Terraform, change DNS, send live GHL/Slack/email alerts, or mutate production AWS resources without explicit approval.
Do not expose secrets or raw PII in Slack, docs, logs, run-status artifacts, PR evidence, or committed files.
Terraform PR work is validate/plan-only with cutover disabled by default.
Keep S3-first persistence for seller leads, buyer signups, and deal-interest.
Protect deal exact addresses and hidden/draft media by default.
